title: DebateSynthesis
description: Final synthesis after a multi-agent debate.

headline.description: One-sentence answer to the question, reflecting the majority direction.

rationale.description: Two to four sentences explaining the strongest reasoning behind the headline.

majorityClaims.description: Claims that received broad support across participants.

minorityClaims.description: Notable positions held by a minority. Empty array if there were none.

openQuestions.description: Questions the debate could not resolve. Empty array if none.

confidence.description: How confident the synthesis is in the headline given the spread of claims.
